sentence: 运动员站在领奖台上，听着国歌流下了眼泪。
pinyin: Yùndòngyuán zhàn zài lǐngjiǎngtái shang, tīngzhe guógē liú xiàle yǎnlèi.
english: Standing on the podium, the athlete shed tears while listening to the national anthem.

pinyin: Wǒmen qù hǎibīn sàn le gè bù.
english: We took a stroll along the seaside.

meaning: supervise and urge sb. to complete a task
sentence: 父母要督促孩子养成写作业的习惯。
pinyin: Fùmǔ yào dūcù háizi yǎngchéng xiě zuòyè de xíguàn.
english: Parents should urge their children to develop the habit of doing homework.

sentence: 餐厅贴出告示，要求杜绝浪费食物的行为。
pinyin: Cān tīng tiē chū gào shì, yāo qiú dù jué làng fèi shí wù de xíng wéi.
english: The restaurant posted a notice demanding that food waste be completely eliminated.

sentence: 爷爷腿不方便，出门要坐轮椅。
pinyin: Yé ye tuǐ bù fāng biàn, chū mén yào zuò lún yǐ.
english: Grandpa has trouble with his legs and needs a wheelchair when going out.
